title: viola sandaiojiaoensis
intro: Viola sandaiojiaoensis, also known as Chinese Violet or Sandaojiao, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the viola genus in the family Violaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparation of Viola sandaiojiaoensis typically involves drying the leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
